source: /audit full — 2026-06-21 run-3 (post run-2 salvage; score 69). Stacks on PR #48.
note: The ship-relevant residual after rounds 1-2: one security cluster (SSRF + silent-failure eval scripts + CB race), the heal/snapshot failure-branch test gap, the hooks.json PostToolUse MultiEdit gap, and code dedup. Force-fix mode. lane ∈ {A,B,C,D}. The Resolve phase confirms/corrects suggestedEntityId against the vendored glossary. Documented-intentional items (Porter stemmer, verify-twins parser, anemic Config, sourceable-script set posture) are EXCLUDED — already carry ADR/inline rationale.

lanes.C: wiki-dev-eng-ingest — scripts/{reachability,offline-draft,offline-query,eval-compare-ollama,eval-ablation-report,eval-produce-ollama,eval-produce-ollama-query,eval-produce-baseline,eval-query,eval-ingest-extract,session-start}.sh, hooks/hooks.json, src/commands/{heal,snapshot}/* + tests, src/core/{vault-lock,git,staleness}.test.ts, src/commands/hook/protect-raw-gate.ts, src/commands/backlog/backlog.ts

findings.summary: $endpoint (CLI flag / settings.json) passed straight to `curl "$endpoint/api/tags"` with no URL validation → SSRF to 169.254.169.254 / internal hosts. Add a `^https?://<host>(:port)?$` allow-list guard before every curl. Same fix applies to offline-draft.sh:273.

Circuit-breaker state file (/tmp/claude-wiki-pages-cb-ollama.json) read-modify-written without a lock by concurrent probes (cb_state/cb_record_failure/cb_record_success) → lost-update on the failure counter, breaker can trip incorrectly. Wrap the RMW in an flock (reuse vault-lock.sh flock idiom or a dedicated CB lock).
Executable script runs `set -uo pipefail` WITHOUT `-e`; a silently-failing subprocess is presented as a valid result. Add `set -e`.
Same missing-`-e` on the ablation matrix scorer. Add `set -e`.

The self-heal loop's most important failure mode — non-convergence (f.changed===0 → unresolved populated, clean=false) — has no behavioral test. Add it via the injectable VerifyFn/FixFn seams, asserting HealReport.unresolved observably (NOT by spying on the lock).
The 'iterate files → read → test → collect' skeleton is repeated 5× across the check functions where a table-driven pass removes the repetition. Table-drive it.
Four identical `[...tracked].filter(re).length` passes over the same Set where one pass suffices. Collapse into a single pass.

Missing `set -e` and this script is SOURCED by the runtime fabrication-deny path (offline-query.sh) — a swallowed failure could silently disable the 'deny answer on missing citation' guard. Add `set -e` (highest priority of the set-e items).
Missing `set -e` on the runtime offline-query deny path. Add `set -e`.
Missing `set -e`. Add it.
Missing `set -e`. Add it.
Missing `set -e`. Add it.

PostToolUse matcher is `Write|Edit` — excludes MultiEdit, so post-wiki-write.sh + post-ingest-summary.sh skip after a bulk edit → stale index.md/log.md. (PreToolUse correctly covers MultiEdit, so the write-confinement gate is intact.) Change to `Write|Edit|MultiEdit` AND update the scripts/CLAUDE.md hook-wiring table + the matching tests/scripts in lockstep (design-drift gate-04 enforces hook set-equality).
Unvalidated endpoint → curl on the runtime offline-draft path. Apply the same URL allow-list guard as S01.
`eval "$_score_out"` is structurally unsafe (low live risk — output is self-produced). Replace eval with `read key=value` parsing.
rowCells ≈ extractTableRow — same markdown-table-row parse. Extract a shared core/markdown-table.ts.
otherVaults.split(":")... split/filter duplicated. Extract a parseOtherVaults helper.
otherVaults raw colon-list. Pairs with S17 — a small typed value object.
Top-level handler stringifies a non-Error `err` to stderr (may leak object internals). Redact / stringify safely.
Unbounded Promise.all at default concurrency 32 (prospective — all checks sync today). Bound the parallelism to the resolved concurrency value (chunk the dispatch).
The no-vault path is untested. Add a behavioral test.
branch/both checkpoint modes untested. Add behavioral tests.
Tests spy on the internal withVaultLockSync. Re-write to assert observable output (SnapshotReport.sha===null) via the injectable seams, not the lock internals.
The R08 test mirrors the template frontmatter byte structure (brittle). Assert the contract (required fields present, parseable) not the exact bytes.
The commit→null branch is untested. Add the negative case.
`generated:` set from `new Date().toISOString()` with no clock injection — unverifiable + latent across-midnight flake. Inject the clock (mirror the heal/staleness clock seam) and test it.
`expect(Number.isNaN(bad.getTime())).toBe(true)` asserts a fixture property, not engine behavior. Assert what staleness does with the bad date.
`30_000` re-derived inline; it is already named GIT_TIMEOUT_MS in git.ts. Import/reuse the named constant.
Peer-command import of firewall/firewall.ts. Route through core to remove the lateral command→command dependency.
Empty `if` body inside isExempt. Remove or implement (and comment why if a deliberate reminder).
Empty-string vault key untested (low real-world risk). Add the negative case.
appendLog wall-clock fallback when `today` is not threaded. Thread the date or inject the clock.
Single-pattern grep on $PROMPT with a mild ReDoS shape. Bound/anchor the pattern (low priority).
bun-types pulls transitive @types/node:"*" — closed by the lockfile (low). Pin if it ever drifts; otherwise document as lock-closed.

patterns.summary: Make the 8 named predicate functions (frontmatter-validate.ts:165-271, ontology-lint, vocabulary-lint) combinable (and/or/not) and reusable across verify/fix.

Extract a typed OllamaProvider port (mirroring GitProvider) over reachability.sh:229 + offline-draft.sh:24 — enables test stubbing AND closes the SSRF surface behind one validated boundary (ties to S01/S14).
Strengthen the branded path types (link-resolver.ts:47-83) with construction-time validation — guards the known basename-vs-alias misrouting.
A Vault aggregate root gating wiki//raw//schema access and enforcing schema-check-first. Architect to scope — large.
